sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَجِدْ غُصُونُ أَصْدِقَاءَ فِي الصَّفِّ الْجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ghusun nije pronašla prijatelje u novom razredu.
sentences.translationEn: Ghusun did not find friends in the new class.

sentences.translation: Osjećala se usamljeno u prvim sedmicama.
sentences.translationEn: She felt lonely in the first weeks.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَبْدَأَ هِيَ وَتُكَلِّمَ زَمِيلَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da sama počne i razgovara sa drugaricama.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to take the initiative and speak to her classmates.
Little by little she built beautiful friendships.
